excerpt.zh: 整理了日常开发中最常用的 Git 命令：分支管理、撤销修改、远程同步等，适合随时查阅。
excerpt.en: A handy reference for everyday Git commands: branching, undoing changes, and syncing with remotes.

title.zh: 静态网站部署到 GitHub Pages 笔记
title.en: Deploying Static Sites to GitHub Pages

excerpt.zh: 记录从零创建仓库、推送代码到开启 Pages 的完整流程，以及自定义域名的配置要点。
excerpt.en: Notes on creating a repo, pushing code, enabling Pages, and configuring a custom domain.

title.zh: CSS Grid 布局入门心得

excerpt.zh: 用实际页面练手后总结的 Grid 核心概念：fr 单位、auto-fill 与响应式卡片网格的实现方式。
excerpt.en: Core Grid concepts from hands-on practice: fr units, auto-fill, and responsive card grids.
